diagnostic_status.recommended_next_action: Proceed only to production-grid convergence run after zero-mode and Q->0 handling are accepted.

grid_convergence_plan.Q0_policy: exclude endpoint Q=0 and use interior quadrature nodes
grid_convergence_plan.n0_policy: use extrapolated xi->0+ reflection matrix; do not divide by omega=0
grid_convergence_plan.response_grid_strategy: start with direct response grid for audit, then evaluate interpolation grid only after error controls exist

small_Q_audit.Q0_handling_recommendation: exclude endpoint Q=0 and use interior quadrature nodes

zero_mode_audit.zero_mode_recommendation: use extrapolated xi->0+ reflection matrix, not direct division by zero
